text.$description: Semantic aliases — resolve at use-site against the active theme's raw palette. The default palette (no data-theme set, e.g. pre-hydration or vitest) is Warm Slate: its raw values are declared once in the shared `:root, [data-theme="warm-slate"]` block below, so there is a single source of truth for the default light palette.

font-mono.$description: JetBrains Mono is no longer bundled/loaded (spec 055 Phase 1) — the system mono stack is natively hinted on every OS at zero bytes.

sidebar-width.$description: #962: was 200px with ZERO slack against the header's own content sum (mark + brand-name + version chip + collapse button + gaps/padding measured at exactly 199px) — any platform font-metric variance (Windows subpixel rendering, non-1.0 DPR) tips "PlateVault" into its ellipsis safety net. +20px gives real headroom.

control-h.$description: Control height (#616) — single source of truth for toolbar-adjacent controls (buttons, text inputs, selects, SegControl) so they line up in the same row instead of drifting per-component (measured: input 27px, select 25px, button 24px, Settings select 28px, all in one chrome).
